message:
feat(cancel): implement cancel acknowledgment and async finalizer scheduling

Adds the cancel acknowledgment protocol and MaskedFinalizer infrastructure
so that tasks can observe cancellation at checkpoints and run masked async
finalizers before region teardown completes.

Core changes:
- cx.rs: set cancel_acknowledged=true at checkpoint when cancel_requested
  and mask_depth==0, in both checkpoint() and checkpoint_with_message()
- task_context.rs: add cancel_acknowledged bool field to CxInner, initialized
  to false, to track whether cancellation has been observed at a checkpoint
- state.rs: add MaskedFinalizer struct wrapping async finalizers in cancel
  mask; drain_ready_async_finalizers() drains finalizers for Finalizing
  regions; spawn_finalizer_task() creates masked tasks; quiescence check
  now includes no_finalizers; cancel_request() advances regions with
  pending finalizers into Finalizing; task_completed() refactored to borrow
  before removing and extract outcome_kind before task removal

Scheduler changes:
- global_injector.rs: upgrade cancel queue from SegQueue<PriorityTask> to
  Mutex<CancelQueue> with BinaryHeap<CancelTask> using priority+generation
  for FIFO tiebreaking among equal priorities
- priority.rs: add pop_cancel_with_rng() and pop_non_cancel_with_rng()
  methods for lane-selective popping
- three_lane.rs: add schedule_ready_finalizers() to drain and inject async
  finalizer tasks; consume_cancel_ack_locked() reads cancel_acknowledged
  from CxInner and advances task state through CancelRequested→Cancelling→
  Finalizing→Completed; finalizers scheduled after task completion
- worker.rs: parallel implementation of finalizer scheduling and cancel-ack
  consumption logic matching three_lane

Lab runtime changes:
- lab/runtime.rs: add schedule_async_finalizers() called each step;
  consume_cancel_ack() for lab-specific cancel ack consumption;
  reschedule_after_chaos_skip() reschedules non-terminal tasks after chaos
  injection; cancel_streak_limit (DEFAULT=16) prevents cancel starvation;
  lab scheduler pop_for_worker_with_rng() uses streak-limited cancel/
  non-cancel split

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,6 +84,8 @@ pub struct CxInner {
     pub cancel_requested: bool,
     /// The reason for cancellation, if requested.
     pub cancel_reason: Option<CancelReason>,
+    /// Whether cancellation has been acknowledged at a checkpoint.
+    pub cancel_acknowledged: bool,
     /// Waker used to schedule cancellation promptly.
     pub cancel_waker: Option<Waker>,
     /// Current mask depth.
@@ -104,6 +106,7 @@ impl CxInner {
             budget_baseline: budget,
             cancel_requested: false,
             cancel_reason: None,
+            cancel_acknowledged: false,
             cancel_waker: None,
             mask_depth: 0,
             checkpoint_state: CheckpointState::new(),
